3082400.name: Recycling Tycoon: Junk to Gems
3082400.description:
Immerse yourself in the exciting world of retail with Grocery Store Simulator! Experience the everyday life of a supermarket manager and build your business from scratch into a flourishing empire.

Features:

🛒 Build your dream store - From small corner stores to gigantic supermarkets. Design each area according to your wishes and create a unique shopping experience.

📦 Logistics and inventory management - Keep your shelves stocked, manage supply chains and optimize stock levels. This is the only way to satisfy your customers' needs and maximize your profits.

👨‍💼 Staff management - Hire employees, train them and organize their working hours. Satisfied staff are the key to smooth operations and happy customers.

💡 Customer satisfaction - Delight your customers with great offers, high-quality products and unbeatable service. Listen to their wishes and make sure they keep coming back.

🌎 Random events - Suddenly the product delivery has problems? Oh ... or the truck delivering the goods breaks down? Oh no.
Yes, all this can happen. Be prepared.

Why Grocery Store Simulator?

Experience the realistic simulation of a supermarket, coupled with exciting challenges and strategic decisions. Every day brings new surprises and opportunities. Will you be able to meet the needs of your customers and grow your business?
